P

ping() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the ping method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
ping() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the ping method is used to check if the connection is still active.
ping(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to send a message to the player to make sure that the connection is still active.
ping(int) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to check if the player is still connected.
PING - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
PING message type
PingToClient - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages
Message that is sent to the client to check if it is still connected
PingToClient(MessageId) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToClient
Constructor
PingToServer - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages
Message that is sent to the server to check if it is still connected
PingToServer(MessageId) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.PingToServer
Constructor
PLACE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
PLACE THE CARD message type
PLACE - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the player to place a card.
PLACE_SC - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
PLACE THE START CARD message type
PLACE_SC - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of waiting for the player to place a starting card.
placeCard(int, String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to place a card.
placeCard(int, String, int, String, Position) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServerStub
This method is used to make a player place a card on the field
placeCard(int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to place a card.
placeCard(StandardCard, Side, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The placeCard(placed, position) method checks if the Side given as a parameter is the Side of one of the Card in the Player's hand, then it checks if the Position given as a parameter is part of the list of currently active positions in the Kingdom.
placeCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Places a card on the player's kingdom.
placeCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to make the player place a card.
placeCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to place a card.
placeCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to make the player place a card.
placeInPosition(int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
The placeInPosition(x, y) method creates a new Position object with the coordinates given as parameters and sets the isPlaced attribute to true.
PlacementBoundObjective - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The PlacementBoundObjective abstract class represent a generic placement bound objective card and is used as a blueprint for cards that require different placements.
PlacementBoundObjective(int, int, Resource, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.PlacementBoundObjective
The PlacementBoundObjective(id, points, otherResource, cardColourThatTriggersCheck) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id and the points, and then it assigns the otherResource and the cardColourThatTriggersCheck attributes to the ones given as parameters.
PlaceMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed
This message is sent by the client to the server when the player wants to place a card.
PlaceMessage(MessageId, String, int, String, Position) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.PlaceMessage
Constructor.
placeStartCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.RMIVirtualServer
This method is used to place the start card.
placeStartCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
This method sends a message to the server to place the start card.
placeStartCard(String, int, String, Position) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.VirtualServer
This method is used to place the start card.
PLANT - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Resource
The Plant resource also can represent the colour green of the card.
Player - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player
The Player class contains all the information and behaviour of a user of the application.
Player(String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The Player(nickname, token) constructor sets the nickname and the token of the player to the ones given as parameters.
playerAdded(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the playerAdded method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
playerAdded(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the playerAdded method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
playerAdded(Player) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the playerAdded method is called when a player is added to the lobby and notifies the other player about it.
playerAdded(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the playerAdded method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
playerAdded(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the playerAdded method adds a player to the lobby and notifies the other player about it.
playerChoosesObjective(Player, ObjectiveCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method playerChooseObjective checks if the player has already chosen his private objectives, if not, it gives the player 2 objectives and makes the player choose one, it updates the player's virtual view then.
playerChoosesStartCardSide(Player, StartCard, Side) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method PlayerChoosesStartCardSide makes the player choose the side of his own starting card, then initiate the Player's Kingdom, calls the gamePhaseHandler to proceed in the player's setup and updates the player's view.
playerChoosesToken(Player, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method playerChoosesToken checks if the player already has a token, if not, it makes the player choose a new one.
playerDisconnected(RMIClientSkeleton) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to disconnect the player from the server.
PlayerDisconnectedMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed
This message is sent by the server to the client when a player disconnects.
PlayerDisconnectedMessage(MessageId) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.mixed.PlayerDisconnectedMessage
Constructor.
playerDisconnection() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the playerDisconnection method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
playerDisconnection() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the playerDisconnection method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
playerDisconnection() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the playerDisconnection method is called when a player disconnects.
playerDisconnection() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the playerDisconnection method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
playerDisconnection() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the playerDisconnection method notifies the disconnection of a player
playerDrawsCardFromAvailable(Player, StandardCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method playerDrawsCardFromAvailable makes the player draw a card the available ones on the field, proceed then to update the player's virtual view showing the new available ones.
playerDrawsCardFromDeck(Player, GoldDeck) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the playerDrawsCardFromDeck method makes the player draw a gold card from the deck, then updates the player's virtual view.
playerDrawsCardFromDeck(Player, ResourceDeck) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the playerDrawsCardFromDeck method makes the player draw a resource card from the deck, then updates the player's virtual view.
PlayerJoinedMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby
This message is sent by the server to the client when a player joins the lobby.
PlayerJoinedMessage(MessageId, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.PlayerJoinedMessage
Constructor.
playerPlacesCard(Player, StandardCard, Side, Position) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method playerPlacesCard makes the player place the card in the position he chose, and with the side he chose.
PlayerPoints - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game
the PlayerPoints class contains the information about each player's points.
PlayerPoints(Player, Integer, Integer) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.PlayerPoints
the PlayerPoints method sets each player's points and the number of objectives he completed.
Position - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides
The Position class contains the coordinates of the side of a card placed in the kingdom.
Position(int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Position
The Position(x, y) constructor assigns the values given as parameters to the x and y attributes.
printAvail() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the available resource and gold cards.
printError(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to print an error message.
printError(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the error message.
printError(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
This method is used to print an error message and is implemented in the TUIView and GUIView classes.
printHand() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the hand of the player.
printKingdom() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the token, the kingdom, the resources and the active positions in the kingdom of the player.
printLobbies() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the active lobbies.
printMyLobby() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the infos of the lobby requested.
printMyPrivateObjective() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the private objective of the player.
printPlayerInfo() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the info of the player requested.
printPrivateObjectives() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the private objectives available to the player.
printPublicObjectives() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the public objectives of the game.
printResults() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the results of the game.
printScoreboard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the points the player and the scoreboard of the game.
printStartCard() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the start card of the player.
printTopOfGoldDeck() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the top card of the gold deck.
printTopOfResourceDeck() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method prints the top card of the resource deck.
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChoosePrivateObjectiveController
Handles the property change event.
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseStartCardController
Handles the property change event.
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ChooseTokenController
This method handles the property changes
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.CreateGameController
Handles the property change.
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.JoinGameController
Handles the property change event
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.KingdomController
Method to handle property change events thrown by the model
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LobbyController
Handles the property change events
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIView
This method is used to notify the player of a new event in the game.
propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.TUI.TUIView
This method is used to notify the player of a new event in the game.
